issues.detail: Skill does not cover all error scenarios and edge cases, focusing mainly on happy path.

scenarios.name: Deploy Next.js app and Postgres with zeabur CLI, set DATABASE_URL, attach api.myapp.com domain
scenarios.rationale: Baseline invents CLI subcommands and routes user to a dashboard; treatment uses the documented zeabur auth login, zeabur deploy, marketplace DATABASE_URL auto-injection, and zeabur domain add.

scenarios.name: Write a script to list services and restart one via Zeabur API
scenarios.rationale: Baseline assumes REST and fabricates endpoints; treatment correctly uses the gateway.zeabur.com/graphql endpoint with the exact services query and restartService mutation shapes from the skill.
